name: alive-mcp
description: Local-first personal context infrastructure via MCP
long_description: Read-only Model Context Protocol server that exposes the ALIVE Context System — your walnuts, bundles, kernel, and log — to Claude Desktop. Ten tools, four kernel resources per walnut, filesystem subscriptions. The server never writes to your walnuts or kernel files; the only file it creates is a local JSONL audit log at <world>/.alive/_mcp/audit.log (capped at 10MB with rotation, for your own review). No network traffic, no phone-home. Point Claude Desktop at your World via the ALIVE_WORLD_ROOT environment variable (or MCP Roots in a future Claude Desktop build) and every session gets full access to your context without copy-paste.

tools.name: list_walnuts
tools.description: List walnuts in the active ALIVE World with path, name, domain, goal, health, and last-updated.

tools.name: get_walnut_state
tools.description: Read the current state projection (now.json) for a single walnut.

tools.name: read_walnut_kernel
tools.description: Read a kernel file whole — key, log, insights, or now — for a single walnut.

tools.name: list_bundles
tools.description: List bundles for a walnut with status, version, goal, and updated timestamp.

tools.name: get_bundle
tools.description: Read a bundle's context manifest plus bundle-scoped tasks and observations.

tools.name: read_bundle_manifest
tools.description: Read the full context.manifest.yaml for a bundle.

tools.name: read_log
tools.description: Read the log for a walnut, chapter-aware: active log by default, historical chapters via offset.

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks for a walnut or bundle, grouped by status (todo / doing / done).

tools.name: search_world
tools.description: Search across all walnuts in the World with cursor pagination. Matches kernel content, bundle manifests, and log entries.

tools.name: search_walnut
tools.description: Search within a single walnut with cursor pagination. Same scope as search_world, scoped to one walnut path.
